creator: guiseofreality@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Kurt Jaeger from comment #2)

I've removed the pkg-plist and adjusted the Makefile.  Since asyncio wasn't added until Python 3.5, the aiohttp bindings fail.  I'm going keep working on the port to include flavor-accurate pkg-plists for the next release of this library.  This is building and installing in my fresh poudriere installation against py27, py34, py35, and py36.
